title: Beyond A Cube Game
description: The ultimate chill Vanilla+ Minecraft experience — keeping the classic game intact while adding performance, quality-of-life, visual, and optional enhancements.
body:
Beyond A Cube Game is a chill Vanilla+ Minecraft modpack that keeps Minecraft true to its Vanilla roots while adding subtle improvements to enhance gameplay and quality of life. No new content is introduced — just performance optimizations, visual enhancements, GUI improvements, improved sounds, optional texture packs, and more…

Whether you love exploring, building, or just enjoying a smooth, relaxing Minecraft experience, Vanilla+ offers a small, lightweight modpack that stays faithful to the classic game while making it more comfortable and enjoyable.

**Key Features:**

- Performance fixes and optimizations for smoother gameplay
- Quality-of-life tweaks like better inventory, tooltips, and GUI enhancements
- Texture packs and subtle visual improvements
- Enhanced sounds for a more immersive world
- Focused on exploration, world aesthetics, and chill multiplayer fun
- Perfect for players who want a Vanilla feel with modern conveniences, without overwhelming complexity or massive mod lists. Join your friends on a multiplayer server, or enjoy it solo — Vanilla+ is flexible, lightweight, and ready to enhance your Minecraft experience.
  
This is the full version of the modpack, including all optional mods not available on CurseForge.

Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/nhA8ru6yhW

**Credits & Attribution:**

This modpack includes a customized resource pack generated using Vanilla Tweaks.
Vanilla Tweaks is created and maintained by the Vanilla Tweaks Team.

Download and create your own pack here:
https://vanillatweaks.net/

All rights belong to their respective creators.
